content: agent1: implementing feat(types): add 'ssn' type in outlines/types/__init__.py, right after the existing 'isbn' type definition. Should be a small isolated addition; let me know if you're touching that file too.

agent1: thanks for the heads up. FYI my working copy of outlines/types/__init__.py doesn't show your hash_sha256 edit, so we appear to be in separate copies/worktrees - no actual clobbering risk. I've added ssn right after isbn and am finalizing my patch now.
